display.purpose: DM Serif Display. Screen titles, welcome hero, completion heading — the signature voice.

headline.purpose: DM Serif Display at the header bar and CMS section headers.

title.purpose: DM Sans 700. Quiz questions, step/takeaway/card lead lines.

body.purpose: DM Sans 400 at 0.95rem / 1.75 line-height — all reading text.

label.purpose: Uppercase DM Sans 800, letter-spaced. Callout kickers, block labels, CMS field labels, pills.

shadows.name: whisper
shadows.purpose: Resting lift for callouts, cards, chips, quiz options, CMS panels.

shadows.name: lift
shadows.purpose: Hover state and mid-emphasis surfaces (welcome hero, completion card).

shadows.name: shell
shadows.purpose: The module shell only — floats above everything.

shadows.name: focus-ring
shadows.purpose: Teal focus glow on every interactive element, replacing the default outline.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions, entrances, and the progress fill.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The forward / CTA action (Next, Save). Teal gradient, lifts on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.92rem; font-weight: 700; color: #fff; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0d9488, #0f766e); border: none; border-radius: 10px; padding: 12px 28px; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 3px 10px rgba(13,118,110,0.28); transition: transform 0.18s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), box-shadow 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 7px 18px rgba(13,118,110,0.4); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(0) scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(13,148,136,0.35); }

components.name: Back Button
components.description: Secondary / backward action. Flat pale-teal, nudges left on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-back { font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.92rem; font-weight: 700; color: #4b7a76; background: #eaf2f1; border: none; border-radius: 10px; padding: 12px 28px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), transform 0.18s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-back:hover { background: #d5e8e6; transform: translateX(-2px); } .ds-btn-back:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(13,148,136,0.35); }

components.name: Quiz Option
components.description: A selectable answer card. Lifts and turns teal on hover; resolves to green (correct) or red (wrong).
components.html: <button class="ds-quiz-option">Lay the person flat and raise their legs</button>
components.css: .ds-quiz-option { font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.92rem; color: #1e4a47; text-align: left; background: #fff; border: 1.5px solid #b2dfdb; border-radius: 10px; padding: 13px 16px; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(13,59,56,0.06), 0 2px 6px rgba(13,59,56,0.05); transition: transform 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), border-color 0.2s, background 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; } .ds-quiz-option:hover { border-color: #0d9488; background: #f0fdfa; transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 4px 14px rgba(13,59,56,0.08), 0 10px 30px rgba(13,59,56,0.06); } .ds-quiz-option:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(13,148,136,0.35); }

components.name: Tag
components.description: Pill tag with teal outline and optional leading icon.
components.css: .ds-tag { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 700; color: #0f766e; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #2dd4bf; border-radius: 99px; padding: 6px 14px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(13,59,56,0.06), 0 2px 6px rgba(13,59,56,0.05); }

components.name: Block Label
components.description: Tiny uppercase pill labeling a content block (e.g. a quiz or scenario).
components.css: .ds-block-label { display: inline-block; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.9px; color: #0f766e; background: #f0fdfa; border: 1px solid #ccfbf1; border-radius: 99px; padding: 4px 12px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: CMS field input with teal focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input { font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.9rem; color: #1e4a47; background: #fff; border: 1.5px solid #b2dfdb; border-radius: 8px; padding: 8px 10px; width: 100%; transition: box-shadow 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), border-color 0.2s; } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: #0d9488; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(13,148,136,0.35); }

components.name: Content Card
components.description: Resting content surface (step, takeaway). Whisper shadow, hairline teal border, lifts on hover.
components.html: Call for helpDial emergency services before anything else.
components.css: .ds-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #ccfbf1; border-radius: 14px; padding: 15px 17px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(13,59,56,0.06), 0 2px 6px rgba(13,59,56,0.05); transition: transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), box-shadow 0.2s; } .ds-card:hover { transform: translateX(2px); box-shadow: 0 4px 14px rgba(13,59,56,0.08), 0 10px 30px rgba(13,59,56,0.06); } .ds-card strong { font-size: 0.95rem; color: #0d3b38; } .ds-card span { font-size: 0.87rem; color: #4b7a76; line-height: 1.55; }

components.name: Progress Track
components.description: The masthead progress bar — translucent rail with a glowing teal fill and looping sheen.
components.css: .ds-progress { background: rgba(13,59,56,0.12); border-radius: 99px; height: 8px; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: inset 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.18); } .ds-progress-fill { height: 100%; width: 60%; border-radius: 99px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #2dd4bf, #5eead4); box-shadow: 0 0 12px rgba(45,212,191,0.6); position: relative; overflow: hidden; transition: width 0.55s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-progress-fill::after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(255,255,255,0.45), transparent); transform: translateX(-100%); animation: ds-sheen 2.6s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1) infinite; } @keyframes ds-sheen { 0% { transform: translateX(-100%); } 60%, 100% { transform: translateX(100%); } } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-progress-fill::after { animation: none; } }

narrative.overview: PRSM Modules feels like a well-run clinic: serious, prepared, and reassuring all at once. The subject matter is life-safety, so the interface carries authority, but it never raises the learner's pulse. Warmth comes from a single deep-teal identity, soft daylight backgrounds, and gently rounded surfaces that lift off the page with quiet, atmospheric shadow. The system is built for recall under pressure, not for browsing: narrow single-idea screens, generous line-height, and rationed emphasis so the genuinely important moments actually land.
keyCharacteristics: Single committed identity color (deep teal) carrying warmth and authority
Serif display + humanist sans pairing for calm, spoken-aloud hierarchy
Soft, teal-tinted ambient elevation — depth as atmosphere, not drama
Rationed emphasis with a fixed severity color language
Narrow, single-idea reading column tuned for retention

rules.name: The Single Identity Rule
rules.body: Teal is the only brand color. Amber, red, blue, and green exist only to carry meaning (caution, danger, info, success). Never reach for a semantic color as decoration, and never introduce a sixth accent hue.

rules.name: The Severity Lock Rule
rules.body: Teal = guidance, amber = caution, red = danger. This mapping is fixed across player and CMS. A red border always means 'this can hurt you'; never spend red on anything that isn't genuinely dangerous.

rules.name: The Spoken-Title Rule
rules.body: Only the serif speaks. Use DM Serif Display for titles and hero/completion moments and nothing else; body, UI, and labels are always DM Sans.

rules.name: The Loud-Label Rule
rules.body: All-caps labels are tiny (≤0.76rem), heavy (800), and letter-spaced. That weight-plus-tracking is what makes them read as labels; never set an all-caps label at body weight or body size.

rules.name: The Teal-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Every shadow is tinted toward pine teal (rgba(13,59,56,…)), never neutral black. A gray drop-shadow is a defect: it reads cold and breaks the warmth.

rules.name: The Whisper-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces rest at Whisper. Deeper shadow (Lift) is a response — to hover or to genuine importance — not a resting decoration.

dos: Do keep teal as the only brand color; reserve amber/red/blue/green strictly for caution/danger/info/success.
Do tint every shadow toward pine teal; resting surfaces stay at Whisper and only deepen on hover or genuine importance.
Do open ideas with DM Serif Display and set everything else in DM Sans; keep body at 0.95rem / line-height 1.75 in the ≤780px column for recall.
Do ration emphasis — one clear point per screen — so warnings and the completion moment actually land.
Do convey state with icon, label, and color together, never color alone; honor prefers-reduced-motion and keep tap targets ≥44px for AA.
donts: Don't ship sterile corporate e-learning: no stock photos, clip-art, gray compliance boxes, or dead 'Next →' filler.
Don't go childish or gamified: no mascots, no confetti storms, no badge-spam that undercuts the life-safety seriousness.
Don't fall into the generic AI/SaaS template: no purple-gradient hero, no repeating icon-heading-text card grid, no hero-metric blocks.
Don't use gray (neutral-black) shadows — they read cold and break the warmth.
Don't set body copy in the serif, and don't spend a semantic color on decoration; meaning colors must always mean something.
